song.title: Two of Us
song.keywords: infidelity, relationship betrayal, phone addiction, hookup apps, gay relationships, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Two of Us' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Two of Us Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: 'Love's not enough when the hunger's alive' - Opening song from The Unseen Chorus exploring relationship betrayal.

twitter.title: Two of Us Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus
twitter.description: 'Two of us but I'm already gone / The first lie whispered before the dawn'

essay: "Two of Us" is the devastating opening number of The Unseen Chorus's narrative arc. What begins as a tender portrait of domestic love—coffee, socks, shared laughter—quickly reveals the cracks beneath the surface. The protagonist lies next to his partner while secretly engaging with hookup apps in the dark.

The song captures the heartbreaking contradiction at the core of infidelity: genuine love coexisting with compulsive betrayal. "Love's not enough when the hunger's alive" articulates the beginning of a spiral that will define the entire musical.
song.lyricsHtml:
He takes his coffee too hot
Leaves his socks by the bed
Laughs at shows I've seen a hundred times
He's not perfect no one is
But he's mine

Two of us in morning light
Shirts on chairs our love feels right
Kisses soft the day begins
Home is here in the warmth of his skin

But some nights
The sheets feel empty even with him near
My chest burns my hands ache
Like something's gone something I can't hold

I love him but the hunger grows
A secret itch nobody knows
I tell myself it's just a phase
But the wanting doesn't fade

It's nothing just a screen just a glow in the dark
Just a glow in the dark
The thrill hits hard my body knows
Body knows lies begin where the phone light shows

Two of us but my eyes slip away
Two of us but my hands want to stray
Two of us and I still can't deny
Love's not enough when the hunger's alive

Don't look at me now
He turns in his sleep
I swipe I tap hard already
It's just one message
Just one lie

Two of us but my eyes slip away
Two of us but my hands want to stray
Two of us but I'm already gone
The first lie whispered before the dawn
